Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.plugins.javac

Class JavaCompilerCheckFacade

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.plugins.javac.JavaCompilerCheckFacade
public class JavaCompilerCheckFacade extends Object
This facade checks whether the Java program to be verified is compilable using javac via the JavaCompiler class .

For setting up javac it uses the KeY project information about the bootpath and classpath. Any issues found in the compilation are reported to a provided listener of type ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener.

Checking the target Java code can be enabled / disabled by providing the property -PKEY_JAVAC_DISABLE=true / -PKEY_JAVAC_DISABLE=false on startup of KeY.

  • Method Details

    • check

      public static @NonNull CompletableFuture<List<PositionedIssueString>> check(ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener listener, File bootClassPath, List<File> classPath, File javaPath)
      initiates the compilation check on the target Java source (the Java program to be verified) and reports any issues to the provided listener
      Parameters:
      listener - the ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener to be informed about any issues found in the target Java program
      bootClassPath - the File referring to the path containing the core Java classes
      classPath - the List of Files referring to the directory that make up the target Java programs classpath
      javaPath - the String with the path to the source of the target Java program
      Returns:
      future providing the list of diagnostics
